name: VIX (CBOE Volatility Index)
summary: Created 2026-05-13 per markets dossier E1 promotion. **C7 VIX 18.43 — STILL SUB-20 ON THE STRONGEST KINETIC TAPE OF CYCLE.** Expected on a weekend that produced NYT preparation report + UAE Barakah drone strike + Saudi territorial drone intercept + Trump-Netanyahu war coordination + Trump 'clock is ticking' + Israeli security cabinet + Brent +2% gap: VIX 23-28 Monday. Why still suppressed: (i) Friday +6.8% was already the inflation-shock + Warsh transition; vol complex already absorbed the Fed-channel re-pricing; (ii) move was orderly across asset classes (no correlated panic); (iii) summer ranges typically compress; (iv) NVDA reports May 20 keeping vol-sellers active; (v) **Tuesday May 19 NSC binary** — vol traders see this as a digital event (deal or strike), not a continuous variable; positioning is asymmetric long-tail-vol, not flat-vol bid; (vi) Pakistan-Naqvi mediation Day 2 of 14 + Houthi Red Sea Day 7 UNTRIPPED + Mojtaba Khamenei Day 11 of state-media silence = coordinated quietism from Iran's patron/proxy network, suggesting escalation control not escalation. **VIX paradox is intact**: the paper-equity leg of the bifurcation has been resolved (Friday -1.2% S&P), but the vol complex has NOT capitulated yet. Either VIX is wrong (snap to 23-28 on Tuesday strike orders) or oil/Brent is wrong (retraces to $103-106 by Friday on no-strike). **VIX >22 sustained 2 sessions = regime confirmation; currently 18.43, ~3.6 vol points from confirmation.** **PRIOR (May 17): MARKETS CLOSED SUNDAY — OPERATIVE LEVEL IS FRIDAY MAY 15 CLOSE 18.43 (+6.8% 1D, +2.7% 1M, -9.2% 3M). Vol complex still SUB-20.** **TRIGGER WATCH: VIX >22 sustained 2 sessions = regime confirmation.** Per markets-dossier H reversibility map: VIX 12-14 (-22 to -33%) if MOU signs by May 21 (now near-zero probability given Trump posture); VIX 26-32 (+45 to +80%) if Hormuz remains closed through June (base case given NYT report). **If Monday May 18 open prices the NYT preparation report fully, VIX +30% spike to 23-24 is base case.** Why VIX has not capitulated: (a) move was ORDERLY across asset classes — no liquidity event, no margin call signature; (b) summer ranges typically compress (June-August seasonal vol depression); (c) NVDA earnings May 20 keeps vol-sellers active (front-end vol sold into the print); (d) systematic dealers still LONG GAMMA above 7,400 SPX — they BUY dips, suppressing realized vol. **The asymmetric long-vol setup remains the cleanest hedge structure of the cycle**: if Monday opens with NYT-priced gap-up in Brent and VIX gaps to 23-24, regime change is confirmed. **PRIOR (May 16):** VIX 18.43 (+6.8% 1D, +2.7% 1M, -9.2% 3M) — vol complex repriced into the stagflation-shock day but did NOT capitulate (still sub-20)**. Yesterday's cycle low of 17.26 was the cleanest setup of the cycle; today's resolution direction is toward crisis confirmation but not yet panic. **Why VIX stayed sub-20 despite S&P -1.24%, NASDAQ -1.54%, Dow -1.07%, 10Y +14bp**: (a) move was orderly across asset classes — bond/equity/precious-metal all sold simultaneously into the PPI+Warsh+Trump-reversal stagflation collision; (b) summer ranges typically compress; (c) NVDA earnings May 20 keeps vol-sellers active; (d) systematic dealers still long gamma above 7,400 SPX. **TRIGGER WATCH: VIX >22 sustained 2 sessions = regime confirmation.** **The asymmetric long-volatility setup that yesterday's cycle-low cycle-low VIX created has activated** — paper-equity leg of cycle-extreme bifurcation has resolved violently into crisis confirmation. **Resolution path forward**: if Iran formally rejects Trump's May 16 letter and ceasefire collapses, VIX 24-28 base case; if Shamkhani-Trump frame materializes (sanctions-for-dismantling), VIX retraces 16-17. **The Trump 2-month letter window is the binding decision-tree input for VIX through ~2026-07-16.** PRIOR (May 15): **C9 VIX 17.26 (-3.4% 1D, -5.0% 1M, -14.9% 3M) — CYCLE LOW SINCE WAR BEGAN FEB 28; PAPER-PHYSICAL BIFURCATION AT EXTREME.** Expected on a day with two new kinetic incidents (Hui Chuan + Haj Ali), an Israeli KIA inside the Litani trigger window, Trump Iran ultimatum overnight ('no longer tolerate'), and Iranian Army spokesperson Akraminia 'surprising options' rhetoric: VIX should be 22-25. Got: 17.26. **Why complacency**: Trump-Xi joint statement read as tail-risk removal; S&P/NASDAQ/Dow at record closes May 14 → MoM gamma drives systematic vol selling; pre-NVDA earnings May 20 positioning bullish risk; VIX ETF complex pushing contango trade aggressively; foreign safe-haven USD bid is the alternative hedge of choice — VIX is being short-circuited as the crisis-hedge instrument. **CLEANEST PAPER-PHYSICAL BIFURCATION READING OF THE CYCLE**: Paper assets are pricing structural-stability + tail-risk-removed + AI-cycle dominance. Physical complex (Brent +1.6% refusing to fall, VLCC TD3C still multi-week highs, kinetic incidents continuing, war risk insurance still ~8x pre-war) is pricing intact-blockade + escalation-tail-risk. **ONE SIDE RESOLVES VIOLENTLY WITHIN 5-10 SESSIONS.** Asymmetric setup: if Trump-Xi joint statement produces no operational follow-through by May 20 and Brent breaks $108 sustained 2 sessions, VIX has 5-7 points of repricing upside; if Hormuz reopens physically, VIX could compress further to 15. PRIOR (May 14): VIX 17.87 sub-18 on 1-week-clock-close day; summit-pause digital regime. **G4 VIX 17.87 (-0.7% 1D, -2.7% 1M, -13.3% 3M) — SUB-18 ON A 1-WEEK-CLOSE DAY** = on Day 7/7 of Trump's 'decide within a week' mandate, with Brent above $105 and Hormuz at 2-5 ships/day, VIX should print 22-24. Sub-18 says markets fully priced Trump-Xi pause through May 16. **If pause fails to deliver framework, VIX +30% spike to 23-24 by Monday is the base case** (markets dossier G4 + H). Trump-Xi summit Day 1: Trump publicly opened HEU-via-China custodian door; Vance softer line; Pentagon Sledgehammer naming. Forced-pause-via-Beijing hypothesis operationally validated through clock close. **Per markets dossier H reversibility map: VIX 12-14 (-22 to -33%) if MOU signs by May 21; VIX 26-32 (+45 to +80%) if Hormuz remains closed through June.** Binary digital — summit is forcible time-window where the binary collapses to a digital. PRIOR (May 13): VIX has emerged as the cleanest transmission mechanism for binary event-window pricing in the cycle — appearing in 4+ causal chains (C1, C2 direct; C5, C9 indirect). The summit-pause mechanic operationalises VIX as a digital around discrete event windows. **C1 VIX 17.99 (-2.1% 1D, -5.9% 1M, -13.6% 3M) = THE PARADOX OF MAY 13** — expected on day of Trump-rejection-1-week-clock-close + Litani-crossing + 90%-enrichment-rhetoric + Saudi-strikes-disclosure + USD/INR record: VIX +5-10% intraday. Got: -2.1%, below May 6 post-pause low, approaching pre-war territory. **Why: Trump-in-Beijing summit (May 14-15) makes a kinetic strike order operationally impossible through May 15-16. Markets are not pricing the threat universe; they are pricing the FORCIBLE DELAY of decision. Options-positioning desk reads: 48-hour vol kill via timeline mechanics.** Additional drivers: EIA forecast cut to $94.85 (TASS) institutional vote against Brent fear premium; Aramco/ADNOC quiet limited Hormuz resume (World Oil May 8) confirms physical supply ~90% preserved through East-West routing; Iran missile fire rate -92% from peak (JPost + CNN intel) = capability-vs-willingness gap publicly quantified. **Investor implication is asymmetric: if Trump returns from Beijing without an order, VIX 16-handle is plausible and Brent retraces to $97-100. If he returns AND orders, VIX +30% intraday and Brent $115-120. The summit is a binary digital, not a continuous variable. The market is positioned long-vol-cheap into a known event window.** Reversibility: total — VIX 17.99 prices NO escalation through the summit + modest probability beyond; a single tweet from Beijing or a single missile launch reprices everything within the same session. VVIX (vol-of-vol) sitting at low band; pre-CPI hedges unwinding after digestion was orderly. **VIX behaviour now central to graph because it operationalises the kinetic vs paper-disruption-vs-de-escalation trinary in a tradeable way** — the band $15-25 maps to the three branches, and the summit creates a forcible time-window where the binary collapses to a digital.

current.regime: BIFURCATION RESOLVING TOWARD CRISIS — paper-equity leg has capitulated cleanly (S&P -1.24%, NASDAQ -1.54%, Dow -1.07%) but VIX did NOT capitulate (still sub-20). Three-force stagflation collision: April PPI +1.4% + Warsh effective May 16 + Trump immediate post-summit reversal + new May 16 nuclear ultimatum letter. 10Y +14bp to 4.595%; silver -9.1%; gold -2.6%. **TRIGGER WATCH: VIX >22 sustained 2 sessions = regime confirmation.** Iran's response to Trump's May 16 letter within 2 months is the binding decision-tree input.

active_triggers.condition: VIX <16 sustained 3 sessions = de-escalation confirmation marker
VIX >25 intraday = kinetic-event marker (Trump strike order, Iran ballistic launch, Israeli enrichment strike)
VIX +30% intraday move within 48h of Trump's return from Beijing (May 15-16)
active_triggers.note: Per markets dossier C1: summit is binary digital; Trump returns either with kinetic order (VIX +30% / Brent $115-120) or without (VIX 16-handle / Brent $97-100).

recent_signals.headline: **VIX -3.3% TO 17.82 — DIGITAL-EVENT PREMIUM BLEEDING OFF; 22-SUSTAINED TRIGGER MOVES FURTHER FROM THRESHOLD.** Yesterday's brief explicitly called Tuesday a 'digital event (deal or strike)' with VIX at 18.43 reading as the 'vol complex priced the Tuesday NSC as a binary.' Trump's postponement post moved the binary OUT of Tuesday into a 2-3 day / 'five-day' window — vol complex re-prices: digital premium that was concentrated into May 19 spreads across a longer window. VIX gaps -3.3% to 17.82, moves FURTHER from the 22-sustained trigger threshold. **The VIX move is structurally consistent with the postponement, NOT with a peace deal.** If a real framework deliverable had landed, VIX would be at 14-16. At 17.82, vol is pricing 'extension of the window,' not 'resolution of the conflict.' **The May 24 NYT-window close (Day 1 of 6 remaining yesterday → Day 0 of 5 today) is the next vol-priced binary.** Reversibility: inverts on strike orders within the window (back to 22-28); compresses further to 14-16 only on framework deliverable.
sources: Intel dossier 2026-05-19 A13; Markets dossier C3
recent_signals.verification: VIX 17.82 / -3.3% 1D = CONFIRMED operational; postponement-driven vol re-pricing = CONFIRMED mechanically on news timing; trigger threshold math = CONFIRMED.

recent_signals.headline: C1 VIX 17.99 (-2.1% 1D, -5.9% 1M, -13.6% 3M) = THE PARADOX OF THE DAY. Expected on Trump-rejection-1-week-clock-close + Litani-crossing + 90%-enrichment-rhetoric + Saudi-strikes-disclosure: VIX +5-10% intraday. Got -2.1%, below May 6 post-pause low, approaching pre-war territory. **Why: Trump-in-Beijing structural ceiling — summit makes kinetic strike order operationally impossible through May 15-16; markets pricing FORCIBLE DELAY of decision, not threat universe; options-positioning desk reads 48-hour vol kill via timeline mechanics.** Additional drivers: EIA forecast cut to $94.85 (institutional vote against Brent fear premium); Aramco+ADNOC quiet limited Hormuz resume (World Oil May 8) confirms physical supply ~90% preserved through East-West routing; Iran missile fire rate -92% from peak (JPost+CNN intel).
